characters.name: Ace and Eddie
characters.description: Ace and Eddieare two crooked mechanics. Ace was voiced byMichael Bell, while Eddie was voiced by the latePat Buttram. In the episode "Graham Canyon", they intentionally dug a pothole on a deserted road to swindle unsuspecting customers out of the money that it would cost to fix their cars. However, due toAngelicaandTommymistaking their garage for the Grand Canyon, they sneak in and begin to accidentally knock down tires. However, neither mechanics see the two and believe the car to be haunted. Worried for more troubles, they repairStu's car, charge free and insist they get back on the road. In the episode "Graham Canyon", they intentionally dug a pothole on a deserted road to swindle unsuspecting customers out of the money that it would cost to fix their cars. However, due toAngelicaandTommymistaking their garage for the Grand Canyon, they sneak in and begin to accidentally knock down tires. However, neither mechanics see the two and believe the car to be haunted. Worried for more troubles, they repairStu's car, charge free and insist they get back on the road.

characters.name: Al-Sabu
characters.description: Al-SabuAlso Known AsSabuGenderMaleBirth Date1989Age2RaceHumanOccupationNoneInterestsReptarRelationshipsRelativesUnknownFriendsTommy PicklesChuckie_Finster (1991)Phil DeVilleLil DeVilleEnemiesNoneBehind the scenesVoice ActorKate DonahueFirst Appearance"Heat Wave"(Rugrats) (Season 4) (1997)GalleryAl-Sabuis a toddler the Rugrats befriend in "Heat Wave". Al-Sabu is possibly of Arab descent, judging by his accent and clothing. One hot afternoon in the park, he helped quench the other babies' thirst by guiding them across the hot basketball court to a new source for water. He's very helpful and kind to the others, he also admiresTommy's bravery, saying, "He is a very brave baby or a very silly one." Like the babies, he is also a fan ofReptar. characters.name: Alan Quebec
characters.description: Alan Quebecis a one-timeRugratsminor character and the host of the fictional game show "Super Stumpers" (a parody of the game showJeopardy!), which Jarvis Brown on television,Edmund Hayneson television and in person atKLPO, andDidi Picklesat KLPO compete on. He is an obvious parody of the late real-life game show hostAlex Trebek, who provides his voice. He has short brown hair and a mustache. His attire is consisted of a yellow suit and a green tie. You can find Alan Quebec galleryhere.

characters.name: Alien Spike
characters.description: Alien Spikeis a one-eyed, dog-like doppelganger ofSpike. He lives withDidor,Stuvon, andRobot Louin a large spaceship. This minor character was part ofTommy's dream in which he was abducted by UFOs. He is most likely non-existent, just like his owners, since he is only a figment of Tommy's imagination. Although at the end of the episode there is a hint he may be real. ﻿Alien Spike is the pet of aliens Didor and Stuvon. He resides in a large spaceship that his owners use to abduct children from Earth. He only has one eye and a strong resemblance to the Pickles' family pet, Spike. Alien Spike has not been heard barking, growling, or making any sounds whatsoever, though the character's barks probably sound somewhat like the barks of Spike. ﻿Alien Spike has brown fur and two gray spots. He has no legs and eyes on his ears' ends and his tail. The character has one large white eye and a red-brown nose.

characters.name: Allen Murphy
characters.description: Mr. Allen Murphyunexpectingly shows up atStuandDidi's house to sell them insurance. This scene comes off similar to a horror film, complete with a mysterious stranger on a rainy day. It turns out that Allen is merely trying to con the Pickles' out of money. He is voiced byPhil Proctor. You can find Allen Murphy galleryhere.

characters.name: Alyssa Carmichael
characters.actor_name: Kath Soucie(The Last Babysitter)Bettina Bush(Junior Prom-onwards)
characters.description: RugratsAll Grown UpAlyssa CarmichaelGenderFemaleBirth DateSeptember 12, 1975 (Rugrats 1991)Age16 (Rugrats)26 (All Grown Up!)RaceHumanOccupationUnknownInterestsHelpingSusieTalking on the phoneRelationshipsRelativesSusie(sister)Randy Carmichael(father)Lucy Carmichael(mother)Edwin CarmichaelandBuster Carmichael(brothers)Chowder(pet cat)Ty(husband)Gabrielle(daughter)Great Aunt T(great aunt)Charles(great uncle)FriendsSusie CarmichaelEnemiesBuster Carmichael(sometimes) (Rugratsonly)Behind the scenesVoice ActorKath Soucie(The Last Babysitter)Bettina Bush(Junior Prom-onwards)First Appearance"Meet the Carmichaels" (1993)Last Appearance"In The Family's Way" (2007)Gallery Alyssa Jasmine Carmichael(born September 12, 1975) is the oldest daughter as well as the oldest child in the Carmichael family. Alyssa and the rest of her family made their first appearance in "Meet the Carmichaels". Alyssa is a typical teenager; she desires more independence, loves gossiping on the phone, enjoys hanging out with her friends and boyfriend, Todd, and is also overly concerned about her appearance (she once overreacted when her younger sister, Susie, unintentionally pointed out a zit to her). In the original series, Alyssa is 16 years old, thirteen years older than Susie, so she's old enough to drive a car. Like Angelica Pickles' mom, Charlotte, Alyssa spends much of her free time talking on the phone. Alyssa feels that her parents (mainly her father) treat her like a little kid instead of having to treat her like a teenager, and wants to be more independent, but despite that, Alyssa enjoys spending time with her younger siblings (especially Susie), and even enjoys reading children's books to her sister and Tommy Pickles.

characters.name: Amelia Carnes
characters.description: Amelia CarnesAlso Known AsQuiet Little Amelia (byTommy)GenderFemaleBirth Date1989Age12RaceHumanOccupationSchool StudentInterestsSafetyRelationshipsFriendsIzzyEnemiesTommy PicklesChuckie FinsterBehind the scenesVoice ActorCandi MiloFirst Appearance"Izzy or Isn't He?" (2004) (Only Appearance)Gallery Amelia Carnesis a minor character who ran againstChuckieand Izzy for safety commissioner in theAll Grown Up!episode, "Izzy or Isn't He?". Amelia is a short light-skinned girl who wears a pink sweater vest with a white t-shirt underneath along with patterned skirt. She has brown hair wrapped into a half ponytail with a purple hairband. She is described to be extremely quiet.
